backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the INDO KIDZ backend, implementing user profiles, school info, fee categories, and payment records with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (removing homepage content blocks and adding a Payment Requests admin tab) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens, including light and dark mode variants for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'INDO KIDZ' and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Homepage, Admissions, FeeStructure, Gallery, FeesPayment, ContactUs, AdminPanel), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, and renders a shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Simple full-page access denied screen with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the homepage, shown when a non-admin user attempts to access the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/Admissions: Admin form for editing and saving admissions page content fields (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ, portal link) using query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/Announceme: Admin panel for creating, editing, and deleting school announcements with inline edit state and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactEdi: Admin form for viewing and updating school contact information (name, phone, email, address, social links) with dirty-state tracking and tooltip help text.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactMes: Read-only admin view that fetches and displays contact form submissions sorted by timestamp, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentEdi: Empty or placeholder file for an admin content editor component with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeeCategor: Admin component for managing fee categories with full CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeePayment: Read-only admin view that displays all fee categories with their IDs and amounts fetched via React Query, including loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin component for uploading (base64, max 2MB) and deleting gallery photos with caption support, preview, and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/HomeConten: Admin editor for the home page hero section, allowing updates to school name, tagline, address, stats, highlights, and testimonials via a form with React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentReq: Read-only admin view listing all payment requests sorted by ID, showing status badges (pending/approved/rejected), category names, and a pending count summary.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeCusto: Admin UI component for customizing site theme, allowing selection of preset color schemes or custom primary/accent colors and font choice, with save functionality via the useUpdateThemeSettings mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with school branding, social media links, a quick-links navigation list, and a contact section showing address, phone, and email information.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with links, Internet Identity login/logout, admin-only Customize button, and a principal ID banner with copy functionality for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and save a profile, shown only when the user is logged in but has no existing profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, admin checks, school info, fee categories, gallery, announcements, theme settings, contact messages, and payment requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines Tailwind CSS base/component/utility layers, sets CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and declares animation keyframes and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Protected admin page that verifies authentication and admin status before rendering a tabbed interface for managing home content, admissions, fees, gallery, contact, announcements, theme, messages, and payment requests.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Displays the school admissions page with sections for eligibility, process, documents, application steps, and FAQ, fetched via a query hook with fallback default content. Includes a hero banner and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page showing school contact info (phone, email, address, social links) fetched from a query, alongside a contact form that submits messages via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/FeesPayment.tsx: Provides a fee payment form where students select a fee category and payment mode; on submission it shows a success confirmation screen with the selected fee details.
frontend/src/pages/FeeStructure.tsx: Displays fee categories fetched from the backend as styled cards with gradient headers, showing each fee's name and amount per academic year, with skeleton loading and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Shows a masonry photo gallery fetched from the backend with hover captions and a lightbox modal for full-size image viewing, including skeleton loading and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: React homepage component for IndoKidz school website, rendering hero section, stats, highlights, announcements, fee categories, and testimonials using data from custom query hooks with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the IndoKidz UI.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording three pending feature requests: removing two content blocks from the About section and adding an admin-only Payment Requests tab in the Customize panel.
